response.original_title: ⭐1-(864).336.8850  How to get Money out of Exodus wallet?{Money Out}
response.overview: To withdraw funds⭐1-(864).336.8850  from your Exodus wallet, you either sell your crypto directly⭐1-(864).336.8850  ⭐1-(864).336.8850  to fiat for your bank or transfer ⭐1-(864).336.8850  the cryptocurrency to an external exchange to cash out. Exodus acts strictly as a storage wallet, so converting to traditional currency requires third-⭐1-(864).336.8850  party services.  Option 1: Selling Crypto to Fiat in Exodus⭐1-(864).336.8850  If the integrated sell feature is supported in your region, you can withdraw directly to your bank account or debit card using third-party⭐1-(864).336.8850  apps like MoonPay built into the Exodus interface.
